---
title: "MHC Class II HBoV"
author: "Ibnu A"
date: "2026-04-18"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

## R Analysis — MHC-II Peptide Binding Data

This page outlines a structured R analysis pipeline for the three attached MHC-II peptide binding datasets:

- **`consolidated_peptide_table`** — 74 unique peptides × 27 HLA alleles (EL & median percentiles)
- **`MHCII_consolidated_peptide_table_sort`** — 133 peptides × HLA-DRB1*12:02 & *15:02 (sorted by global median)
- **`peptide_table`** — Long-format per-allele records with binding scores & core motifs

```{r cars}
summary(cars)
```

## Including Plots

You can also embed plots, for example:

```{r pressure, echo=FALSE}
plot(pressure)
```

Note that the `echo = FALSE` parameter was added to the code chunk to prevent printing of the R code that generated the plot.
_A
